initial_location_description: A vibrant, sun-drenched high school classroom in a clean manhwa art style. Large windows show a clear blue sky. The chalkboard is filled with notes about the 'History Term Project', and students are buzzing with nervous energy in their wooden desks.
initial_bgm: upbeat school atmosphere with a hint of tension

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: [Tapping the board] Quiet down, everyone. I have the finalized list for the History Term Project partners.
main_dialogue.tone: Authoritative and dry. The sound of a teacher who has done this a thousand times and just wants to finish the period.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding wooden pointer, tapping it against open palm, stern disciplinary look
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: rhythmic wooden tapping on a chalkboard

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.text: [Whispering] Please let us be together, Seo-yoon! If I get paired with one of the guys from the soccer team, my GPA is toast.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Conspiratorial Whisper': leaning in close, voice low but high-pitched with anxiety and excitement.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Whispering a secret, one hand cupped near her mouth, leaning in with a conspiratorial glint in her eyes

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Don't worry, Hana. We usually end up in the same bracket. Just... stay positive.
main_dialogue.tone: Calm and steady, though there is a hint of underlying nervousness in her breath.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting her rose-gold glasses with her middle finger, looking focused and studious

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: Moving on. Park Min-ji and Lee Hana...
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting wire-rimmed glasses with one finger, looking downward intensely

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Completely exhausted, slumped shoulders, blank expression with 'soul leaving body' effect

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: And finally... Min Seo-yoon. You will be working with... Kang Ji-ho.
main_dialogue.tone: Final and absolute. He closes the book with a definitive snap.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing straight, holding attendance book against chest, neutral expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The world seems to stop for a moment. The air in the classroom grows heavy as the name 'Kang Ji-ho' echoes against the walls.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Wait... [Stuttering] Mr. Han? Did you say... Ji-ho? As in, the guy who hasn't opened a textbook since the orientation?
main_dialogue.tone: Pure shock, voice cracking slightly with disbelief and rising panic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: The list is final, Seo-yoon. Perhaps your 'studious influence' will do him some good. Now, everyone, get to your partners.
main_dialogue.tone: Dismissive and tired, already moving toward his desk to sit down.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sighing with eyes closed, hand rubbing the bridge of his nose, looking tired and overworked

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Seo-yoon turns slowly, her neck feeling stiff. In the very last row, leaned back against the window, sits the source of her upcoming academic nightmare.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Looks like you're stuck with me, Class President. Try not to make it too boring, okay?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Lazy Drawl': slow, melodic, and deeply irritating. Every word drips with casual confidence.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting on an invisible chair, one leg crossed over the other, leaning chin on palm, smirking.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: [Thinking] This is a disaster. A complete, unmitigated disaster. I can't let him ruin my perfect record.
main_dialogue.tone: Internal monologue: Sharp, frantic, and judgmental.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pouting, arms crossed over her book, looking away with a slightly annoyed expression.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Listen, Ji-ho. If we're doing this, you're following my schedule. No basketball, no excuses, and no being late!
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and bossy, attempting to take control of the situation.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Whoa, scary. You always this intense, or is it just for me?
branching_dialogue.tone: Playful and mocking, completely unfazed by her outburst.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Ask Mr. Han to change partners.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Sir, I really think I would be more productive with someone else. Our... learning styles are quite different.
branching_dialogue.tone: Polite but desperate, pleading with her eyes.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands clasped together over her book, bowing her head slightly in an apologetic pose.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
branching_dialogue.text: Different is good, Seo-yoon. It builds character. My decision stands.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Chin resting on interlaced fingers, cold and analytical gaze directed forward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: [Laughing] Ouch. Rejected by the teacher. Don't worry, I won't bite.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing heartily with eyes closed.
